title: Class Support cum Bus Attendant | Bedok | 5 Days | Up To $2.3K - 4461
description:
Class Support cum Bus Attendant
Salary: $2000 - $2300
Working Hours: Monday – Friday (7am – 1pm / 2pm), 34 hours / week
Location: Siglap & Bedok Reservoir (Pick up & Drop off)

Responsibilities:

1) Class Support Purpose

  • To provide support to Teacher and Teacher Aide

Job Description

  • To assist and support Teacher/Teacher Aides in community-referenced outing trips or in class relief.
  • To assist and support Teacher/Teacher Aides in ensuring classroom orderliness in areas of physical structure and setting up of work stations during class.
  • To assist students in areas of self-care, grooming and toileting, whenever the need arises.
  • To assist and support Teacher in collecting direct data on behaviour and progress monitoring of students.
  • To collaborate and support Teacher/Teacher Aides in classroom management and implementation of behaviour intervention plan.
  • Any other tasks assigned by the supervisor

2) Bus Attendant Purpose

  • To provide support to students onboard school bus, to and from school (AM session)

Job Description

  • To receive students when the school bus arrives at pick-up points. To check their well-being (physical and emotional) before they board the bus to ensure students are safe and ready for bus transport.
  • To monitor and support students while they are onboard bus to make sure they are safe and appropriately behave during bus journey, using person-centric and ASD- informed strategies.
  • To safely handover students to their caregivers when bus reaches their drop-off destinations.
  • To give feedback to caregivers, bus company or class teachers, whenever there are safety/ behavioural concerns presented by the students in the bus.
  • Any other tasks assigned by the supervisor

Requirements

  • Minimum GCE ‘N’ Level
  • Experience in dealing with children and youths with autism will be an advantage


Email: supreme.jacksontan@gmail.com

Tan Yong Zhi (Jackson) | Reg: R24124461

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte. Ltd | EA No: 14C7279
